dialogs.description:
Donut absolutely SLAUGHTERED that poor animal.
HOLY SHIT can someone call the POLICE this CAT neeeds to be ARRESTED!!!
WHY would Donut just do something so BRUTAL?!
He looks so CUTE, there is NO WAY she could have done THIS! :exploding_head: :astonished:

(wow you beat the game, you can end this misery with 'Q' or 'ESC')
